# Security Policy

## Reporting a vulnerability

Report security issues privately through GitHub Security Advisories on this repository
(the **Security** tab -> **Report a vulnerability**). Please do not open a public issue
for a suspected vulnerability.

Expect an acknowledgement within a few business days; we will coordinate a fix and a
disclosure timeline with you.

## Supported versions

Security fixes target the latest released major version of `fastify-rabbitmq`.
